name: Mushroom Barley Bake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Medium Pearled Barley (Quaker Scotch Brand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and broth to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add barley and salt; reduce heat to low.
3. Cover the pot and simmer for 50 to 60 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the barley is tender.
4. Drain the barley mixture.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Heat margarine in a skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, onion, and thyme; sauté for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. In a large bowl, combine the cooked barley and beaten eggs.
8. Add the mushroom mixture to the barley and egg mixture; stir well to combine.
9. Transfer the batter to an 11x7-inch glass baking dish.
10. Cover with aluminum foil.
11. Bake for 15 minutes.
12. Remove the foil and continue baking for another 15 minutes, or until the top is light golden brown.
NOTE: To substitute 1 cup Quaker Scotch Brand Quick Pearled Barley, decrease water to 2 cups and simmer time to 10 to 12 minutes. Follow the recipe as directed.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS PER SERVING:
Calories: 99
Carbohydrates: 6 g
Protein: 3 g
Fat: 7 g
Calcium: 17 mg
Sodium: 180 mg
Cholesterol: 70 mg
Dietary Fiber: 1 g
